nasb.text: Now Abraham and Sarah were old, advanced in age; Sarah was past childbearing.

esv.text: Now Abraham and Sarah were old, advanced in years. The way of women had ceased to be with Sarah.

cnv.text: 當時，亞伯拉罕和撒拉都老了，上了年紀，撒拉的月經也停止了。

ccb.text: 亚伯拉罕和撒拉已经年纪老迈，撒拉的月经也已经停了。

csbs.text: 亚伯拉罕和撒拉都已经老了，上了年纪，撒拉的月经也停止了。
